docs.name: Docs
docs.use: Architecture docs, option papers, strategy docs, EA deliverables, policy docs

journal.name: Journal + Blog
journal.use: Daily journals, blog HTML files, EOD summaries

memory.name: Memory + Context
memory.use: MEMORY.md, agent context files, shared decisions

sprint.name: Sprint Docs
sprint.use: Sprint reports, SLA reports, QBR outputs, retrospectives

social.name: Social
social.use: LinkedIn posts, social content, campaign drafts

canvas.name: Canvas
canvas.use: HTML canvas documents, blog HTML, dsync files

note: NEVER upload to root. Always specify --parent with the correct folder ID.
